name: krakenocean
description: KrakenOcean — hệ thống quản lý quảng cáo (frontend + backend tách riêng)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend exec -- tsx --test tests/billing.test.ts tests/hierarchyFilters.test.ts
